title: IDM-VTON Virtual Try-On
description: Serverless virtual try-on using IDM-VTON. Send a human image, garment image, pose image, and mask — get a photorealistic try-on result back. Requires a GPU with 16GB+ VRAM.

input.name: Weights Path
input.description: Path to the IDM-VTON model weights on the network volume.

input.name: Weight dtype
input.description: Model precision: float16 (faster, less VRAM) or float32 (higher quality).
